Beille 12pc Stainless Steel Cookie Cutters Baking Supplies Kitchen Essentials

Bring creativity and precision to your baking with Beille versatile 12 piece cookie cutter set, featuring four classic shapes in three convenient sizes each. The set includes: three hearts, three stars, three circles and three flowers, each in small, medium, and large sizes, perfect for layering, decorating, or creating matching sets.

Key Features

  • 12PC COOKIE CUTTER SET: Includes three stars, three circles, three hearts, and three flowers in small, medium, and large sizes, ideal for baking cookies of all shapes and sizes, perfect for home bakers and pros alike
  • STAINLESS STEEL: Built to last and made from food safe, stainless steel that resists rust, holds shape and delivers crisp, even cuts every time; each shape nests neatly for compact storage and effortless organization
  • VERSATILE BAKING SUPPLIES: Perfect for cookies, biscuits, fondant, pastries, fruit slices, sandwiches and more for both everyday baking and fun celebratory occasions
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, these cookie cutters can be placed directly in the dishwasher after use; perfect for busy bakers who want to spend more time creating and less time cleaning up
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Set Weight: 0.12lbs; Approximate Diameters: Small: 1.5 inches; Medium: 2.0 inches; Large: 3.0 inches; Color: Silver; Sold as a set of 12pcs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE-BFJLTR7Q
  • UPC: 810131777647
  • Color: Silver

Use the cookie cutters for cookies, biscuits, fondant, pastries, or even fruit and sandwich cutouts; these cookie cutters or cookie molds make home baking fun for all ages! And, crafted from durable stainless steel, each cookie cutter slices cleanly through dough without sticking or warping, ensuring consistent shapes every time, while the nested design makes storage simple and space saving.

Whether you’re preparing sugar cookies for the holidays, shaping biscuits for brunch, or adding charm to fondant and pastries, these cookie cutters make it easy to craft beautiful, uniform designs each and every time. Happy baking!
